title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: HERMISTON MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health services for both adults and children. Services include individual and group therapy, mental health assessment, case management with other service providers, and medication management when necessary. 595 NW 11th Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-3pm (541) 567-2536 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 567-2536 Main phone Main phone (541) 567-2536 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for information FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. No one will be denied care due to inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Varies by site Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Early Intervention for Mental Illness Group Counseling In Person Crisis Intervention Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Case Management Psychiatric Medication Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HERMISTON
